name: face-to-sticker
description: Turn a face into a sticker

image.description: An image of a person to be converted to a sticker
image.title: Image

instant_id_strength.description: How strong the InstantID will be.
instant_id_strength.title: Instant Id Strength

ip_adapter_noise.description: How much noise is added to the IP adapter input
ip_adapter_noise.title: Ip Adapter Noise

ip_adapter_weight.description: How much the IP adapter will influence the image
ip_adapter_weight.title: Ip Adapter Weight

negative_prompt.description: Things you do not want in the image
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

prompt_strength.description: Strength of the prompt. This is the CFG scale, higher numbers lead to stronger prompt, lower numbers will keep more of a likeness to the original.
prompt_strength.title: Prompt Strength

seed.description: Fix the random seed for reproducibility
seed.title: Seed
